title: sloanea dentata var. massonii
intro: Sloanea dentata var. massonii, also known as the Malabar ironwood or ironwood tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Elaeocarpaceae family and is native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Sloanea dentata var. massonii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
